**Module group:** Feature Systems
**Namespace:** `lurek.grep`

## 🎯 Purpose

Text search engine for game content: literal, regex, glob, fuzzy, parallel file search.

[⬆ back to top](#table-of-contents)

Text search engine for game content: literal, regex, glob, fuzzy, parallel file search.

## 🧩 Key Types

- `LFileFilter` (4 methods) - Lua userdata that controls which files are scanned by a LGrepEngine instance.
- `LGrepEngine` (5 methods) - Lua userdata that performs pattern-based search across game content files.

## ⚙️ Module Functions

### Module-Level Functions

#### lurek.grep.jsonSearch

#### Definition

```lua
--- Searches a JSON file for all values associated with a given key name at any depth.
---@param file string Path to the JSON file to search.
---@param key string Key name to search for in the JSON structure.
---@return table Array of tables with fields: path (string), value (string).
lurek.grep.jsonSearch = function(file, key) end
```

#### Description

Searches a JSON file for all values associated with a given key name at any depth.

Parameters:

- `file` (`string`, required): Path to the JSON file to search.
- `key` (`string`, required): Key name to search for in the JSON structure.

Returns: `table` - Array of tables with fields: path (string), value (string).

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local results = lurek.grep.jsonSearch("content/examples", "api-stub")
    print("json results = " .. #results)
end
```

#### lurek.grep.logSearch

#### Definition

```lua
--- Searches a structured log file by log level and regex pattern, returning matched entries.
---@param file string Path to the log file to search.
---@param level string Log level filter (e.g. "ERROR", "WARN"); empty string matches all.
---@param pattern string Regex pattern to match against log messages; empty string matches all.
---@return table Array of tables with fields: line (integer), message (string), timestamp (string?), level (string?).
lurek.grep.logSearch = function(file, level, pattern) end
```

#### Description

Searches a structured log file by log level and regex pattern, returning matched entries.

Parameters:

- `file` (`string`, required): Path to the log file to search.
- `level` (`string`, required): Log level filter (e.g. "ERROR", "WARN"); empty string matches all.
- `pattern` (`string`, required): Regex pattern to match against log messages; empty string matches all.

Returns: `table` - Array of tables with fields: line (integer), message (string), timestamp (string?), level (string?).

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local results = lurek.grep.logSearch("logs/runtime.log", "ERROR", "panic")
    print("log results = " .. #results)
end
```

#### lurek.grep.luaFilter

#### Definition

```lua
--- Creates a file filter preset that matches only Lua source files (.lua extension).
---@return LFileFilter A file filter configured for Lua files only.
lurek.grep.luaFilter = function() end
```

#### Description

Creates a file filter preset that matches only Lua source files (.lua extension).

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua

    local fil = lurek.grep.luaFilter()
    print("lua filter created = " .. tostring(fil ~= nil))
```
```lua
end
```

#### lurek.grep.newEngineOpts

#### Definition

```lua
--- Creates a new grep engine with custom search configuration options.
---@param opts table Options table with fields: threads (integer), case_sensitive (boolean), whole_word (boolean), max_file_size (integer).
---@return LGrepEngine A new configured grep engine instance.
lurek.grep.newEngineOpts = function(opts) end
```

#### Description

Creates a new grep engine with custom search configuration options.

Parameters:

- `opts` (`table`, required): Options table with fields: threads (integer), case_sensitive (boolean), whole_word (boolean), max_file_size (integer).

Returns: `LGrepEngine` - A new configured grep engine instance.

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local opts = { case_sensitive = false, threads = 2, whole_word = false }
    local eng = lurek.grep.newEngineOpts(opts)
    print("engine with opts created = " .. tostring(eng ~= nil))
end
```

#### lurek.grep.newFilter

#### Definition

```lua
--- Creates a new empty file filter that can be configured to match specific file patterns.
---@return LFileFilter A new empty file filter instance.
lurek.grep.newFilter = function() end
```

#### Description

Creates a new empty file filter that can be configured to match specific file patterns.

Returns: `LFileFilter` - A new empty file filter instance.

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local fil = lurek.grep.newFilter()
    fil:addExtension("lua")
    print("filter created = " .. tostring(fil ~= nil))
end
```

#### lurek.grep.search

#### Definition

```lua
--- Searches a directory tree for files containing an exact literal pattern string.
---@param path string Root directory path to search in.
---@param pattern string Literal text pattern to search for.
---@return table Array of tables with fields: file (string), line (integer), text (string).
lurek.grep.search = function(path, pattern) end
```

#### Description

Searches a directory tree for files containing an exact literal pattern string.

Parameters:

- `path` (`string`, required): Root directory path to search in.
- `pattern` (`string`, required): Literal text pattern to search for.

Returns: `table` - Array of tables with fields: file (string), line (integer), text (string).

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local results = lurek.grep.search("content/examples", "api-stub")
    print("files searched = " .. results.files_searched)
    print("total matches = " .. results.total_matches)
end
```

## 🔹 Module Methods

### LFileFilter Methods

#### LFileFilter:addExtension

#### Definition

```lua
--- Add allowed file extensions — Lua userdata object exposed by the engine.
---@param ext string Extension (without dot).
function LFileFilter:addExtension(ext) end
```

#### Description

Add allowed file extensions — Lua userdata object exposed by the engine.

Parameters:

- `ext` (`string`, required): Extension (without dot).

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local fil = lurek.grep.newFilter()
    fil:addExtension("lua")
    fil:addExtension("toml")
    print("LFileFilter:addExtension ok")
end
```

#### Definition

```lua
    fil:excludeExtension("min.lua")
    print("LFileFilter:excludeExtension ok")
end
```

### LGrepEngine Methods

#### LGrepEngine:count

#### Definition

```lua
--- Count total matches without returning line details.
---@param path string Directory to search.
---@param pattern string Text pattern.
---@return number Total match count.
function LGrepEngine:count(path, pattern) end
```

#### Description

Count total matches without returning line details.

Parameters:

- `path` (`string`, required): Directory to search.
- `pattern` (`string`, required): Text pattern.

Returns: `integer` - Total match count.

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local eng = lurek.grep.newEngine()
    local n = eng:count("content/examples", "api-stub")
    print("LGrepEngine:count=" .. n)
end
```

#### LGrepEngine:multiSearch

#### Definition

```lua
--- Search with multiple patterns simultaneously.
---@param path string Directory to search.
---@param patterns table Array of literal patterns.
---@return table Search result.
function LGrepEngine:multiSearch(path, patterns) end
```

#### Description

Search with multiple patterns simultaneously.

Parameters:

- `path` (`string`, required): Directory to search.
- `patterns` (`table`, required): Array of literal patterns.

Returns: `table` - Search result.

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local eng = lurek.grep.newEngine()
    local results = eng:multiSearch("content/examples", { "api-stub", "lurek.math" })
    print("LGrepEngine:multiSearch files=" .. results.files_searched)
    print("LGrepEngine:multiSearch matches=" .. results.total_matches)
end
```

#### LGrepEngine:search

#### Definition

```lua
--- Search a directory for a literal pattern.
---@param path string Directory to search.
---@param pattern string Text pattern to find.
---@return table Search result with matches, files_searched, total_matches, duration_ms.
function LGrepEngine:search(path, pattern) end
```

#### Description

Search a directory for a literal pattern.

Parameters:

- `path` (`string`, required): Directory to search.
- `pattern` (`string`, required): Text pattern to find.

Returns: `table` - Search result with matches, files_searched, total_matches, duration_ms.

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local eng = lurek.grep.newEngine()
    local results = eng:search("content/examples", "api-stub")
    print("LGrepEngine:search files=" .. results.files_searched)
    print("LGrepEngine:search matches=" .. results.total_matches)
end
```

#### LGrepEngine:searchExt

#### Definition

```lua
--- Search with file extension filter.
---@param path string Directory to search.
---@param pattern string Text pattern.
---@param extensions table Array of file extensions (e.g., {"lua", "toml"}).
---@return table Search result.
function LGrepEngine:searchExt(path, pattern, extensions) end
```

#### Description

Search with file extension filter.

Parameters:

- `path` (`string`, required): Directory to search.
- `pattern` (`string`, required): Text pattern.
- `extensions` (`table`, required): Array of file extensions (e.g., {"lua", "toml"}).

Returns: `table` - Search result.

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local eng = lurek.grep.newEngine()
    local results = eng:searchExt("content/examples", "api-stub", { "lua" })
    print("LGrepEngine:searchExt files=" .. results.files_searched)
    print("LGrepEngine:searchExt matches=" .. results.total_matches)
end
```

#### LGrepEngine:searchFiles

#### Definition

```lua
--- Search a specific provided list of files for text matches.
---@param files table Array of file paths.
---@param pattern string Text pattern.
---@return table Search result.
function LGrepEngine:searchFiles(files, pattern) end
```

#### Description

Search a specific provided list of files for text matches.

Parameters:

- `files` (`table`, required): Array of file paths.
- `pattern` (`string`, required): Text pattern.

Returns: `table` - Search result.

#### Example

Source: [grep.lua](../blob/main/content/examples/grep.lua)

```lua
do
    local eng = lurek.grep.newEngine()
    local results = eng:searchFiles({ "content/examples/grep.lua", "content/examples/font.lua" }, "api-stub")
    print("LGrepEngine:searchFiles files=" .. results.files_searched)
    print("LGrepEngine:searchFiles matches=" .. results.total_matches)
end
```
